name: Western Light Broil with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef top round or boneless
6 oz Asparagus tips, blanched (2.5 inches long)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine light soy sauce, honey, lemon juice, finely chopped green onions, and garlic powder.
2. Pour the marinade over the steak and turn to coat evenly. Place in the refrigerator and marinate for 6 to 8 hours, turning occasionally.
3. Remove the steak from the marinade and discard any remaining liquid.
4. Place the steak on a rack in a broiler pan so that the surface of the meat is 3 to 4 inches from the heat source.
5. Broil for 16 to 20 minutes until medium-rare, turning once.
6. Keep the steak warm while preparing the vegetables and serving.
7. Arrange an equal amount of each vegetable in a spoke pattern on four dinner plates.
8. Slice the steak into 1-inch-thick slices and arrange over the vegetables.
9. Top with tomato roses if desired.
10. Serve and enjoy, making sure to serve 4 portions.
